title: Inquiry into An Garda Síochána - December 2022
summary: This inquiry, conducted under Part 5 of the Data Protection Act 2018, concerned a report by An Garda Síochána to the DPC of a personal data breach, following a data breach at a Garda station. The inquiry sought to determine whether infringements of sections 71(1)(f), 72(1), 75 and 78 of the Data Protection Act 2018 had occurred in An Gard...
